candidate_check.description: Macros in all Office applications that are opened programmatically by another application must be opened based upon macro security level.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Office 2016 >> Security Settings "Automation Security" is set to "Enabled (Use application macro security level)".

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key:

HKCU\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Office\Common\Security

If the value AutomationSecurity is REG_DWORD = 2, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Office 2016 >> Security Settings "Automation Security" to "Enabled (Use application macro security level)".
title: Macros in all Office applications that are opened programmatically by another application must be opened based upon macro security level.
